data.name: Lust Epidemic 18+
data.detailed_description:
In Lust Epidemic you’re playing as an ordinary young guy who accidentally encounters a mysterious girl who is trying to stop the spread of a new threat - the lust disease affecting only girls, and it will take a special cure to bring them back to sanity.



Your sister seems to be affected by a weird ailment, and the village witch sends you to collect some herbs to prepare a soothing concoction. In the forest you meet Lynfee, who tells you about a mysterious epidemic of lust spreading across the kingdom - that’s where your quest to stop the plague begins!



Lynfee will grant you the power of curing girls from the illness in the only way possible - through having sex with them! On the way to your goal, you will have to help one girl after another until you find the patient zero - that’s the only way to stop the disease.



Choose your path, make the right decisions, fight the plague, collect empowering gems and look for secrets as you explore meticulously drawn locations, cure hot girls and save the kingdom in Lust Epidemic 💜!

Features:
  • Hot 18+ content 🔥 - explore the bodies of hot girls as you cure them of the overpowering lust disease!
  • Pleasing 2D graphics ✨ - enjoy characters and locations attentively drawn with the utmost attention to detail.
  • Intriguing story 🌟 - stop the spread of the disease and get the whole kingdom back to their normal life.
  • Interactive elements 🧩 - look for items and gems that enhance your powers while you explore the world.
  • Battles and mini-games 🗡️ - fight the plague and clear girls from lust.
  • Choices and enhancements 💎 - find secrets that will make you more powerful as each decision opens up new possibilities!

data.short_description: Explore a world plagued by a weird illness and help save the kingdom in Lust Epidemic 💜 - an adult visual novel where sexual energy is not only a source of pleasure, but also the key to salvation! Will you be able to defeat the mysterious disease that has affected girls all over the kingdom?
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
